summary: Iteration 7 testing complete. All new features verified: (1) Group Conversations - create, add members, list members, send messages all working, (2) Terms & Conditions - mandatory acceptance at registration with 13-section modal, (3) CoinGecko Real Prices - live prices with USD/XAF conversion at rate 610, 24h changes, (4) Legacy Password Rehashing code verified in auth.py. 21/21 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Group Conversations: POST /api/messages/groups creates group with admin role for creator, members get 'member' role
Group Members: GET /api/messages/groups/{id}/members returns all members with roles
Add Member: POST /api/messages/groups/{id}/members adds user with 'member' role
Groups in Conversations: Groups appear in /api/messages/conversations with type='group'
Group Messages: /api/messages/conversations/{id}/send works for group conversations
Terms & Conditions: Registration requires terms_accepted=true, rejects false/missing
Terms Modal: 13 sections displayed in modal with accept button
CoinGecko Integration: Real prices from api.coingecko.com with 5-minute cache
24h Change: Real market change percentages from CoinGecko
Legacy Password: auth.py detects md5/sha1/sha256 hashes and rehashes to bcrypt on login
Chat UI: Create group button, group name input, member search all functional
Chat UI: Group conversations show UsersThree icon to distinguish from direct messages
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test groups during testing (visible in chat page)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified: (1) Group Conversations fully working - create groups, add/remove members, send messages, groups appear in conversation list with type='group', (2) Terms & Conditions mandatory at registration - checkbox + modal with 13 sections, (3) CoinGecko REAL prices - BTC ~$75k, ETH ~$2.3k, prices cached 5min, XAF rate 610, (4) Legacy password rehashing code in auth.py (md5/sha1/sha256 detection). All 8 crypto coins showing real market data with 24h changes. Admin has crypto portfolio worth 107M XAF.

coingecko_price_tests: GET /api/crypto/market - returns 8 coins with real prices (PASSED)
legacy_password_tests: Legacy password detection code verified in auth.py (PASSED)

frontend_ui_tests: Accept terms button checks checkbox and closes modal (PASSED)
Chat page shows create group button (PASSED)
Create group panel has name input and member search (PASSED)
Group conversations visible in conversation list (PASSED)
Crypto page shows all 8 coins with real prices (PASSED)

mocked_apis.note: CoinGecko prices are REAL with fallback if API is down
